heading: Annual reporting to increase interagency collaboration and coordination
label: 283a Annual reporting to increase interagency collaboration and coordination
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 403A of act , was renumbered section 403D and is classified to .July 1, 1944section 283a–3 of this title

Effective DateSection applicable only with respect to amounts appropriated for fiscal year 2007 or subsequent fiscal years, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2007 Amendment note under .section 109 of Pub. L. 109–482section 281 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection applicable only with respect to amounts appropriated for fiscal year 2007 or subsequent fiscal years, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2007 Amendment note under .section 109 of Pub. L. 109–482section 281 of this title

children.heading: Collaboration with other HHS agencies
children.label: a Collaboration with other HHS agencies
children.text: On an annual basis, the Director of NIH shall submit to the Secretary a report on the activities of the National Institutes of Health involving collaboration with other agencies of the Department of Health and Human Services.

children.heading: Clinical trials
children.label: b Clinical trials
children.text: Each calendar year, the Director of NIH shall submit to the Commissioner of Food and Drugs a report that identifies each clinical trial that is registered during such calendar year in the databank of information established under .section 282(i) of this title

children.heading: Human tissue samples
children.label: c Human tissue samples
children.text: On an annual basis, the Director of NIH shall submit to the Congress a report that describes how the National Institutes of Health and its agencies store and track human tissue samples.

children.heading: First report
children.label: d First report
children.text: The first report under subsections (a), (b), and (c) shall be submitted not later than 1 year after .January 15, 2007
